name: ollama_generate
description: Generate structured or unstructured text using a local Ollama model. Supports brand-aware generation when brand_context_path is provided.
failure_modes: Model timeout — Ollama service not running or model not loaded
Output exceeds character_limit and cannot be trimmed cleanly — regenerate with tighter constraints
brand_context_path file not found — generation proceeds without brand context (degraded output)
Model echoes instructions verbatim instead of generating (known mistral:latest failure) — switch to gemma3:4b
dependencies: Ollama service must be running (ollama serve)
brand_context_path file must exist on disk if provided
Model must be pulled locally before invocation

brand_context_path.description: Absolute path to a brand kit or voice/tone file (e.g. badgr_branding_kit.json, voice_and_tone.md). Injected as system context before generation.

character_limit.description: Hard cap on output character count. Enforced post-generation — output will be truncated or regenerated if exceeded.

name: ollama_extract
description: Extract structured data from text using a local Ollama model.
failure_modes: Model returns malformed JSON — retry once, then fall back to manual extraction
Schema mismatch — model fills fields not in schema or omits required fields
Model hallucinates values not present in source text
dependencies: Ollama service must be running
Model must be pulled locally

name: ollama_rag_query
description: Query local knowledge base using embeddings + retrieval.
failure_modes: Vector store is empty or not initialized — returns no results
No relevant chunks found for query — returns empty set (not an error)
Embedding model mismatch between index build and query time — returns irrelevant results
dependencies: RAG index must be populated before querying
Embedding model used at index build time must match query time

name: ollama_validate
description: Validate content against platform + brand constraints. Returns pass/fail with violation details and character count status.
failure_modes: brand_context_path not found — validation runs without brand voice check (char limits still enforced)
Platform not in enum — returns error, do not proceed to output
False positives on brand naming — model may flag valid compound words; manually review before blocking
dependencies: brand_context_path file must exist if provided
Ollama service must be running for LLM-based voice checks

field_type.description: The specific profile field being validated. Used to apply correct character limits per platform.

brand_context_path.description: Path to brand kit or voice/tone file to validate against brand voice rules.

name: ollama_generate_variants
description: Generate multiple content variations for A/B testing.
failure_modes: variant_count exceeds model context window — reduce to 2–3 variants
Variants converge on same structure — increase variation_axis specificity
Model generates variants that violate brand voice — run ollama_validate on each variant before surfacing
dependencies: Ollama service must be running
Model must be pulled locally
Variants should be validated via ollama_validate before use in production

name: ollama_image_spec
description: Returns platform-specific image dimension and format requirements for a given asset type, and optionally validates a source asset path against those requirements. Source assets are pulled from the brand kit (logo, color system). Use before any image export or logo resize step in a profile build.
failure_modes: source_asset_path not found on disk — returns spec only, no transform executed
ImageMagick not installed — transform_command cannot execute
Output directory does not exist — create parent directory before writing
PNG → JPG conversion strips transparency — background color must be set explicitly (#0E305F)
dependencies: ImageMagick must be installed for transform execution (imagemagick package)
source_asset_path must exist on disk if provided
Output directory must exist before writing

asset_type.description: The profile image slot being targeted. Not all platforms support all asset types (e.g. TikTok has no banner).

source_asset_path.description: Optional. Absolute path to the source image or logo file to validate or resize. If omitted, the tool returns spec requirements only.

output_path.description: Optional. Absolute path where the resized/cropped asset should be written. Requires source_asset_path.

brand_context_path.description: Path to badgr_branding_kit.json. Used to apply correct background color and safe-zone rules during resize.

banner.notes: Safe zone center 1260x360. Sides crop on mobile.
Safe area 1546x423 centered. TV shows full 2560x1440.

profile_photo.notes: Displayed at 110x110 on mobile. Stored at 320x320. Displayed as circle.
Desktop display size. Displayed as circle. Minimum 128x128.

cover.notes: Desktop cover. Mobile renders 640x360 center crop. Safe zone: center 820x312 minus 88px bottom-left for profile overlap.

banner.notes: 4:1 ratio. Safe zone: keep key content in center 1200x396.

name: ollama_profile_build
description: Orchestrates a complete social media profile package for a single platform. Generates all text fields (bio, display name, tagline, about/description, CTA) with platform-correct character limits and BADGR brand voice enforced. Returns image asset specs for profile photo and banner/cover. Writes output JSON to the platform post kit directory. Run once per platform for a full profile rollout.
failure_modes: brand_context_path or voice_tone_path not found — ABORT, do not generate without brand context
Model fails structured output (returns instruction echo instead of content) — switch model per model_routing in badgr_brand_rules
Image conversion fails (ImageMagick missing or output dir not writable) — log failure in build_log.json, surface in validation block
Character limit exceeded post-generation — flag in validation violations, trim to limit with manual review
Platform not in enum — ABORT
dependencies: brand_context_path must exist: /home/t0n34781/Desktop/brand/badgr_branding_kit.json
voice_tone_path must exist: /home/t0n34781/Desktop/brand/voice_and_tone.md
logo_source_path must exist: /home/t0n34781/Desktop/brand/official_badgr-logo_px512.png
Ollama service must be running
ImageMagick must be installed
Platform post kit output directory must exist

model.description: Local Ollama model to use for text generation. See badgr_brand_rules model_routing for correct model per task type.

brand_context_path.description: Absolute path to badgr_branding_kit.json. Required for color, logo, and identity injection.

voice_tone_path.description: Absolute path to voice_and_tone.md. Required for BADGR tone enforcement.

logo_source_path.description: Absolute path to the source logo file (e.g. official_badgr-logo_px512.png). Used to generate image specs.

output_dir.description: Absolute path to the platform post kit directory where the profile JSON will be written (e.g. /home/t0n34781/Desktop/brand/tik_tok_post_kit).

overrides.description: Optional field overrides. Any key provided here replaces the generated value (e.g. force a specific handle or tagline).

text_fields.bio_or_about: string — within platform char limit, BADGR voice enforced
text_fields.cta: string — always ends with DM us CTRL at @badgrtechnologies

banner_or_cover.required_dimensions: object — from ollama_image_spec or null if platform has no banner

validation.brand_alignment_score: integer 0–100 — composite: brand voice + naming convention + stats compliance. Deduct: question openers (-15), forbidden name forms (-20 each), fabricated stats (-25), emoji use (-10)
validation.compliance_score: integer 0–100 — composite: char limits + image specs + platform link rules. Deduct: char limit breach (-30), missing image spec (-20), wrong link strategy for platform (-15)
validation.copy_quality_score: integer 0–100 — composite: hook strength + ICP match + CTA clarity + no fluff phrases. Deduct: weak hook (-20), ICP mismatch (-25), missing CTA (-15), forbidden phrases (-10 each)
validation.violations: array of strings — empty if all pass

name: badgr_brand_rules
description: Read-only reference block. Contains BADGRTechnologies LLC brand naming rules, ICP definition, Bolt beta links, content guardrails, and model routing map. Load once per session and cache. Do not re-derive any values in this block manually.
failure_modes: section value not in enum — returns error, caller must use a valid section name
Reference data accessed as mutable — this block is READ ONLY, never write to it during generation

section.description: Which section to retrieve. Use 'all' to load full block into context.

icp.free_cta: Free 15-min site walkthrough — ATL businesses only

platform_link_rules.tiktok: links not clickable in captions — direct to 'link in bio ↑'
platform_link_rules.x: links ARE clickable — use full URLs in tweet
platform_link_rules.facebook: links ARE clickable — use full URLs
platform_link_rules.youtube: links clickable in description — use full URLs with step labels
platform_link_rules.instagram: links not clickable in captions — direct to 'link in bio ↑'

guardrails.no_fabricated_stats: Never use specific numbers (%, $, scores, times) unless sourced from real client work. Use 'results vary' or process-proof language instead.
guardrails.no_question_openers: Never open a caption, bio, or post with a question.
guardrails.no_emojis: Never use emojis in any output field. Brand standard: plain text only.
stats_fallback: BADGR Bolt — live on the Play Store. We ship.
ATL sites leak leads silently. We find it. We fix it.

content_priority.primary: Web Optimization (14-Day Lead Leak & Compliance Fix)

model_routing._note: Codified 2026-04-20. Do not override without updating SYSTEM_CHANGELOG.md.

copy_generation.reason: gemma3:4b delivers clean structured copy with correct brand voice. mistral:latest failed structured generation on X profile build — echoed instructions verbatim twice. Confirmed replacement 2026-04-20.

summarization.reason: 7.2B parameter model handles long-form context compression reliably.

code_and_structured_data.reason: Specialized code model. Use for JSON schema work, transform commands, structured output tasks.

routing_and_utility.reason: Lightweight 3B model. Use for fast classification, routing decisions, and pre-flight checks.
